description: Waldo is a brand intelligence platform for marketers that aggregates brand, category, and audience data across social, ads, news, and related sources. It offers AI-assisted research, monitoring, and a build surface for integrating that data into custom apps and agent workflows.
summary: Waldo exposes a REST Brand Intelligence API at `https://rest.waldo.fyi/v1` plus authenticated MCP endpoints at `https://mcp.waldo.fyi` and curated `https://mcp.waldo.fyi/strategy`; auth is via Waldo API keys, with OAuth also supported for the main MCP server.
